calendar.description: House Business, Labor, and Commerce Hearing
Senate Natural Resources, Agriculture, and Environment Hearing

general_provisions: This bill amends provisions related to specialized products.
hilighted_provisions: This bill:<hr><ltbullet>defines terms;<hr><ltbullet>creates a license for persons that sell specialized products to be administered by the Department of Agriculture and Food (department);<hr><ltbullet>requires specialized product retailers to provide a list of specialized products offered for sale to the department;<hr><ltbullet>requires applicants for a specialized product retailer license to provide ownership information;<hr><ltbullet>prohibits issuing a license if certain individuals involved with the specialized product retailer have violated certain criminal laws;<hr><ltbullet>requires the State Tax Commission to revoke certain tobacco and nicotine licenses if the licensee stores or sells illegally obtained controlled substances;<hr><ltbullet>prohibits advertising of electronic cigarette products and nicotine products in certain locations;<hr><ltbullet>creates fees and penalties related to the license;<hr><ltbullet>criminalizes the criminally negligent sale of tobacco, electronic cigarettes, and nicotine to minors; and<hr><ltbullet>amends provisions related to underage tobacco sales.
